author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
"That's such a team win." 🤝
William Byron reacts to The Crew Motorfest and relives the real thing.

#TheCrewMotorfest Season 10 drops July 1.

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
NASCAR Pros React: William Byron & Mamba Smith Review The Crew Motorfest
We asked NASCAR Cup Series driver William Byron and NASCAR analyst Mamba Smith to watch gameplay from The Crew Motorfest's NASCAR playlist... and react to everything.
Does the game capture what real NASCAR driving actually feels like? What's it really like to win the Daytona 500? Why would you never race a NASCAR at night? Two people who actually know are here to answer those questions.

About The Crew Motorfest:
Welcome to Motorfest! Discover the evergreen festival featuring the best experiences car culture has to offer. Complete your ultimate action driving bucket list through a series of tailor-made races, themed events, and other unique challenges. Explore the vibrant island of O’ahu in Hawaii alone or with your crew. Whatever the way you enjoy cars and driving, there is something in there for you!

#Ubisoft #TheCrew #TheCrewMotorfest

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Riders Republic: Season 19 Launch Trailer
Riders Republic’s newest summer season is here, bringing hot new collaborations with Roxy and Volcom, exciting new Pockett toys, limited-time events, and more. 

About Riders Republic:
Live out the rider's fantasy as you roam free in a huge, vibrant open world, always buzzing with other players around you. Immerse yourself in iconic American national parks including Bryce Canyon, Yosemite Valley, Mammoth Mountain... all mashed up for you to shred! Squad up with your friends and compete in a wide range of multiplayer modes: feel the rush of downhill races, dominate maps in team vs team competitions, or give it your best shot in epic mass PvP races with 50+ other players.

#Ubisoft #ridersrepublic 

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
The Division Resurgence: Season 1 Phase 3 is now Live
Fresh action hits the city.

Season 1.3 is bringing new challenges in The Division Resurgence.
Unlock up to 50 tiers of rewards in the Classified Ops Pass, including the free new exotic weapon: Scorpio, a venomous shotgun that stacks debuffs and devastates enemies!
Engage in new Time-Limited Events to harden your skills. From the Trigger Happy challenge to 3 new Speedrun Missions, be highly rewarded for each success!

Gear up, Agent. The mission isn't over.

About The Division Resurgence:
The Division Resurgence is a free-to-play third-person shooter RPG that features a whole new and independent campaign from Tom Clancy’s The Division 1 and Tom Clancy’s The Division 2, offering a new perspective on key story events.

It takes place in a contemporary post-crisis America where a virus outbreak has created chaos and the collapse of the government. As an agent of the ""Strategic Homeland Division” your mission is to restore peace, to protect civilians against hostile factions, and to help them build a better future.

#Ubisoft #TheDivisionResurgence

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com
